allow: PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; $owningPid = $conn.OwningProcess; if \($owningPid\) { Stop-Process -Id $owningPid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Host "Killed $owningPid" } else { Write-Host "No process on 8000" })
Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('data/knowledge_base.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\(f'제품 수: {len\(data\)}, 오류 없음'\)")
Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('data/knowledge_base.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\([p['id'] for p in data]\)")
Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('data/knowledge_base.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); prods=data.get\('products',[]\); print\(len\(prods\)\); [print\(p['id']\) for p in prods]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'제품 {len\(d\)}개 로드 완료'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p['code_no'], '|', p['name']\) for p in d]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p.get\('code_no','MISSING'\), '|', p['name']\) for p in d]")

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\Work Anti\\stm-calculator"; Start-Process -FilePath "python3.14.exe" -ArgumentList "-m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 4; \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8000/api/products"\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.code_no\) | $\($_.name\)" })

PowerShell($pyExe = "C:\\Users\\220216\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python314\\python.exe"; Set-Location "D:\\Work Anti\\stm-calculator"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath $pyExe -ArgumentList "-m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000" -PassThru; Start-Sleep 5; \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8000/api/products"\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.code_no\) | $\($_.name\)" })

PowerShell(\(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8000/api/calculate" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"product_id":"STM-300599-T4.doc.docx","strength":"5 mg","test_items":["Dissolution"],"batch_count":1}'\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty solutions | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.solution_name\) | theoretical=$\($_.theoretical_volume_ml\) | vol_per_batch=$\($_.volume_per_batch_ml\)" })
PowerShell(\(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8000/api/products"\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object id, code_no, name)

PowerShell($body = '{"product_id":"STM-300599-T4.doc","strength":"5 mg","test_items":["Dissolution"],"batch_count":1}'; $r = \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8000/api/calculate" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $r.solutions | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.solution_name\) | theoretical=$\($_.theoretical_volume_ml\) | vol_per_batch=$\($_.volume_per_batch_ml\)" })

PowerShell($body = '{"product_id":"STM-300599-T4.doc","strength":"5 mg","test_items":["Dissolution"],"batch_count":1}'; $r = \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8000/api/calculate" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $mp = $r.solutions | Where-Object { $_.solution_name -match "Mobile phase" }; Write-Host "=== Mobile phase ingredients ==="; $mp.ingredients | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.name\): $\($_.amount\) $\($_.unit\)" })
